title: Action Items: GCS Milestone 1
text:
# Action Items: GCS Milestone 1

**Attendees:** Lena Okafor, Tyler Moss, Nina Schulz, Rowan Ellery

## Summary

This page covers the test coverage approach for the GCS subsystem. Key items discussed and actions agreed are recorded here.

## Actions

- Follow-up with Nina Schulz on outstanding items.
